pages.title: Why JEI matters
pages.text: Install $(rev)Just Enough Items$(warn). The mod exposes:$(br2)• Every vanilla crafting recipe we ship as datapacks.$(br)• A dedicated $(bold)Sewing Machine$(warn) category mirroring the 4×4 flesh grid.$(br)• A $(bold)Necromancy Handbook$(warn) tab with prose blurbs per item.$(br2)This codex explains $(italic)why$(warn); JEI shows $(italic)exact ingredient matrices$(warn).
